name: Picket
description: A picket fence of vertical pales, the slats fading and re-colouring as the light moves on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 0 30%, var(--color0) 30% 50%); opacity: @rand(0.55, 1); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
